treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Foreign body removal, dilation of the esophagus, and polyp removal
treatment_information.treatment_response: Food in the lower third of the esophagus was removed; otherwise normal findings

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with dysphagia and was admitted to the ED
Patient received glucagon, Ativan, and small sips of ginger ale
EGD performed, foreign body removed from esophagus
Patient discharged with adjusted dosage of Rivaroxaban
Patient went to a rehab facility for physical therapy

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and interactive, ambulatory with assistance
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up with Speech and Swallow team recommended
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient requires assistance or aid (walker or cane)
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient expressed distress over recent mental status changes
